clearly-calendula.description: Clear your skin from within. Our USDA-certified organic Clearly Calendula teas blend calendula flower with botanicals that help fight acne, calm blemishes, and support the glowing skin you deserve — a full day of skincare, one cup at a time.

drinkware.description: Enjoy your BeauTeas hot or iced wherever you go — mugs, travel mugs, and bottles made for your daily skincare-tea ritual.

gift-cards.description: Give the gift of glowing skin. BeauTeas gift cards never expire and are perfect for anyone who loves tea and clean, plant-based beauty.
